income.title: Income Details
income.stockUploadHint: Upload your Stock Award Document in the Import Document tab to populate this table.
income.deductionNote: Tax is applied on NET income after 40% flat-rate deduction (Art. 84/72 Cod Fiscal). Example: 10,000 gross - 40% deduction (4,000) = 6,000 net taxable × 10% = 600 tax. The deduction covers all expenses (no receipts needed).
income.salaryTaxedDeduction: Deduction: income already taxed as salary (BIK)
income.roTradesHint: Data from Romania broker portfolio imported in the Import Document tab.
income.tradesUploadHint: Upload Trade Confirmation PDFs in the Import Document tab. Multiple files are supported.

taxes.title: Tax Calculation Summary
taxes.roNote: Starting 2025, stocks transferred to Romania broker. Romania broker withholds capital gains tax (1%/3%) but NOT CASS. CAS (pension 25%) does NOT apply for investment income. US dividends: US withholds 10% (RO-US treaty), Romania does not tax again but dividends count for CASS.
taxes.dclSubtitle: Use these values to fill in the Declarație Unică D212 form on the ANAF portal.
taxes.dclChapter1: CHAPTER I - Income Tax & Social Contributions for Year {year}
taxes.dclForeignSection: Add foreign income: US Broker (Fidelity / Morgan Stanley)
taxes.dclRoSection: Add Romania income: Tax withheld at source (final tax)
taxes.dclChapter2: CHAPTER II - CASS Payment Option for Year {year} (OPTIONAL)
taxes.earnRoDiv: Romania dividends (US stocks via Romania broker)
taxes.paidUsDivUS: US dividend tax withheld (10% RO-US treaty)
taxes.paidRoCapGains: Romania broker capital gains tax withheld (1%/3% - final tax)
taxes.paidRoDiv: Romania broker dividend tax withheld at source
taxes.finalTaxDone: ✅ Final tax - withheld at source, not declared
taxes.d212DeadlineLabel: D212 filing & payment deadline for income tax + CASS
taxes.cassExplanation: CASS of 10% applies when total investment income exceeds 6 minimum gross salaries ({threshold} RON in {year}). The contribution is capped at 60 minimum gross salaries ({cap} RON).
taxes.cassNotApplicable: Investment income below the CASS threshold for this year.

input.title: Add/Edit Financial Data
input.subtitle: Enter amounts for the selected year. For 2025+, input dividends and stock sale proceeds from both US broker and Romania broker.
input.usDivTaxPaidHint: 10% withheld at source per RO-US treaty
input.roDivTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld at source by Romania broker
input.usCostHint: Cost of ESPP shares purchased at preferential price. Stock awards (free) = 0.
input.salaryTaxedHint: Stock award BIK taxed through Romanian payroll. Auto-calculated from imported Stock Award documents; override here if needed.
input.roGainsTaxHint: Total capital gains tax withheld by Romanian broker (XTB / Tradeville)
input.roCapitalGainsHint: Add capital gains from Romanian broker (XTB / Tradeville) per country of origin. All are treated as final tax withheld by broker.
input.countryHint: Country of origin of the gain
input.interestTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld at source on interest income
input.rentalTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld or paid on rental income
input.royaltyGrossHint: Income from copyrights, patents, software licenses, etc.
input.royaltyTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld at source on royalty income
input.gamblingGrossHint: Net winnings from gambling (already taxed at source)
input.gamblingTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld at source by gambling operator
input.otherGrossHint: Any other taxable income not covered above
input.otherTaxPaidHint: Tax withheld or paid on other income
input.d212DeadlineHint: Deadline for filing D212 and paying income tax + CASS
input.usDividendRateHint: RO-US Treaty: 10% withheld at source by US
input.usCapGainsRateHint: US does not withhold tax on stock sales for non-residents
input.roCapGainsRate: Capital Gains Tax Rate - Foreign / US (%)
input.roCapGainsRateHint: 10% for 2025, 16% from 2026 (non-Romania brokers: Fidelity, Morgan Stanley)
input.roCapGainsLongRateHint: 10% for 2019-2022, 1% for 2023-2025, 3% from 2026 (Romania broker, final tax)
input.roCapGainsShortRateHint: 10% for 2019-2022, 3% for 2023-2025, 6% from 2026 (Romania broker, final tax)

import.title: Import Document
import.subtitle: Upload a PDF or image (screenshot) of your declarations, investment reports, or income certificates. Images will be processed with OCR.
import.ocrLowQuality: Scanned PDF quality too low to extract numbers.
import.ocrManualHint: Please enter the data manually in the Add Data tab, or upload the text-based PDF version from ANAF.
import.ocrTradevilleHint: OCR could not extract table data from this document. The Tradeville Portfolio Statement uses a complex table format that OCR cannot parse reliably. Please enter the data manually in the Add Data tab → 'Romania Broker Capital Gains (per country)'.
import.ocrFidelityStatementHint: This PDF contains complex multi-column tables that could not be parsed with the current OCR engine. For best results with Fidelity Stock Plan Statements, we recommend upgrading to the Full version (PaddleOCR) which has superior table extraction. Go to Settings → Upgrade to Full.
import.processing: Processing... OCR on images may take a moment.
import.ocrUpgradeHint: PaddleOCR offers better accuracy for scanned documents. Click here for details.
import.ocrUpgradeConfirm: This will download Python 3.12 and PaddleOCR packages (~1.7 GB). Requires internet connection. This may take several minutes. Continue?
import.ocrUpgraded: PaddleOCR installed successfully! Now using PaddleOCR.
import.ocrDowngradeHint: Save disk space by removing PaddleOCR ({size}). Click here for details.
import.ocrDowngradeConfirm: This will delete the Python/PaddleOCR folder ({size}) and switch back to Tesseract.js. You can re-install later. Continue?

raw.title: Raw Extracted Data
raw.confirmPurge: Are you sure you want to delete '{file}' and its associated data? This cannot be undone.
raw.noData: No raw data available. Run the extraction script first.
raw.confirmDeleteSelected: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected file(s) and their associated data? This cannot be undone.
raw.confirmDeleteAll: Are you sure you want to delete ALL {count} file(s) and their associated data? This cannot be undone.

footer.confirmRestart: Restart the server? The page will reload automatically.

misc.noRoData: No Romania broker data. Import Romania broker Portfolio and Dividends documents.
misc.creditFiscalTooltip: Tax already paid abroad is recognized as credit fiscal. Romania tax = max(0, RO rate × income - foreign tax paid). You only pay the difference.
misc.roWithheldTooltip: Tax already withheld by the payer (broker, bank, operator). This is final tax — not declared again on D212. Only counts toward CASS threshold.
misc.roCassNote: Romania broker does NOT withhold CASS. Declared via Declarația Unică D212.
misc.legalBasisText: GD no. 1506/27.11.2024, published in Official Gazette no. 1185/28.11.2024
misc.anafUsesMinSalary: ANAF uses the general minimum gross salary:
misc.sectoralNote: Sectoral minimum salaries (e.g. construction) are NOT used for CASS/CAS calculation on non-salary income.
misc.casNotApplicableInvestments: CAS (pension 25%) is NOT due for investment income (stocks, dividends, interest).
misc.cassIncomeNote: These incomes are summed to determine whether and in which tier we fall for CASS calculation.
misc.stockWithholdingDesc: RON amount withheld at source for taxes and contributions on stock award benefits.
misc.bikBreakdownTooltip: Stock award BIK from imported documents, allocated via FIFO to sales in this year
misc.rateAndSalaryApply: The BNR exchange rate and minimum salary apply to this year.
misc.loadError: Failed to load data. Check if server is running.

dcl.cgMethodTitle: ℹ️ Capital gains calculation method (click for details)
dcl.cgFormulaEsppShort:
Taxable = [Sale (USD) − Purchase (USD) − Fees (USD)] × {rate} − Amount taxed as salary (RON)**
Tax = Taxable × 10%
dcl.cgFormulaGrantShort:
Taxable = [Sale (USD) − Fees (USD)] × {rate} − Amount taxed as salary (RON)**
Tax = Taxable × 10%
dcl.cgNote1: * BNR annual average exchange rate for year {year} is {rate}.
dcl.cgNote2: ** Amount taxed as salary = values from payslip under "stock withholding", "SPP gain BIK" or "Stock award BIK".
dcl.divToPay: Dividend tax to pay in Romania
dcl.noRoTaxTreaty: RO tax on US dividends: 0 (RO-US treaty, no double taxation)
dcl.withheldByRO: Tax withheld at source by Romania broker
dcl.divWithheldRO: Tax withheld at source by Romania broker
dcl.whGambling: Gambling income (NOT in CASS - final tax)
dcl.whNote: ℹ️ These amounts (excluding gambling) are used to calculate the CASS tier
dcl.roFinalTaxNote: Tax 1%/3% is FINAL, withheld by broker. NOT declared in D212. Only counts toward CASS threshold.
dcl.ch2OptionD: Option D: Investment income (stocks, dividends, interest)
dcl.ch2NotRequired: ✅ Starting with D212/2025, Chapter II is NO LONGER required. Income estimation for the next year is not necessary.
dcl.ch2IfOptional: If you still want to voluntarily opt for advance CASS payment:
dcl.ch2NoCass: ✅ CASS is not due for this year
dcl.ch2NoCassDetail: Extra-salary income is below the 6×SM threshold ({threshold} RON). No need to fill in Chapter II.
dcl.ch2Note: Chapter II is for opting to pay CASS for the NEXT year. Fill only if you expect investment income.

update.confirmInstall: Download complete. Install now? Your data and documents will be preserved.
update.installing: Installing update... The server will restart automatically.
update.success: Successfully updated to v{version}! Page will reload.
